note: Created wt/pkg/devcontainer/devcontainer.go with HasDevcontainer (checks for .devcontainer dir), GetPrimaryDevcontainerPath (reuses workspace.GetPrimaryProjectPath), and CreateDevcontainer scaffold. Added devcontainer_test.go with tests for both implemented functions.

Implemented copyTemplateFiles in devcontainer.go using Go embed to bundle setup.sh, setup-bash.sh, setup-agents.sh from a templates/ subdirectory. Function creates .devcontainer dir, copies scripts with 0755 permissions, and writes .gitignore with '*' content. All tests pass.

Implemented generateDevcontainerJSON: checks workspace.IsWorktree for conditional .git bind-mount, uses workspace.GetPrimaryProjectPath for primary project name, generates colors with GenerateColorFromPath/GetContrastingForeground/AdjustColorBrightness matching workspace file convention, produces devcontainer.json per DESIGN.md template. Updated CreateDevcontainer to orchestrate copyTemplateFiles + generateDevcontainerJSON.

Implemented CreateDevcontainer orchestration: idempotent check, worktree copy from primary, new creation fallback. Added copyDevcontainerFolder helper and 5 TestCreateDevcontainer subtests covering all acceptance criteria.

Added '[i] devcontainer' to help text in view.go for ItemTypeProject and ItemTypeWorktree cases. Uses devcontainer.HasDevcontainer to conditionally show the command only when .devcontainer doesn't exist. Imported devcontainer package in view.go.
